title: Compile-Time Schema Validation
description: Implement a compile-time schema validator using Zig's comptime features. Validate struct field types and generate runtime validation code at compile time.

complexity.time: O(n) runtime, O(f) comptime where f = fields

requirements: Use comptime to iterate over struct fields
Validate that string fields are non-empty
Validate that integer fields are within specified bounds
Validate that optional fields are properly handled
Return error union with ValidationError type
Generate helpful error messages including field names

few_shot_examples.prompt: Use comptime to get struct field names.
Validate a string field is non-empty at runtime.
